name: vowgrid
description: VowGrid - The trust layer between AI agents and real-world actions

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @vowgrid/contracts build && pnpm --filter @vowgrid/api build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @vowgrid/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter @vowgrid/ui typecheck && pnpm --filter @vowgrid/api typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml down -v && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d
